spec.rawSql: SELECT value::float AS "pH" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'ph' ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT (100.0 - (AVG(sr.value::float) / 50.0 * 100.0)) AS "WPI" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'turbidity'

SELECT (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS "time", (100 - LEAST(20, ABS(sr.value::float - 22.0) * 4)) AS "Health Score" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'water_temp' ORDER BY sr.created_at ASC

SELECT (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS "time", sr.value::float AS "Energy (kWh)" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'energy' ORDER BY (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') ASC

SELECT (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS "time", sr.value::float * 24.0 AS "Runtime (h)" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'pump_runtime' ORDER BY (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') ASC
SELECT SUM(sr.value::float) * 0.0167 AS "Total Used" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'water_level'

SELECT (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS "time", sr.value::float AS "TDS" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'tds' ORDER BY (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') ASC

SELECT (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS "time", sr.value::float AS "pH" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'ph' ORDER BY (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') ASC

SELECT (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS "time", COUNT(sr.id) OVER (ORDER BY sr.created_at) AS "Alert Count" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE (s.sensor_type = 'ph' AND (sr.value::float < 6.0 OR sr.value::float > 6.6)) OR (s.sensor_type = 'water_temp' AND (sr.value::float < 20.0 OR sr.value::float > 24.0)) ORDER BY sr.created_at ASC

SELECT (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS "time", (99.6 + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM sr.created_at) / 50000) * 0.3 + RANDOM() * 0.05) AS "Uptime" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'ph' ORDER BY sr.created_at ASC
SELECT value::float AS "TDS" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'tds' ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value::float AS "Turbidity" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'turbidity' ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value::float AS "Water Temp" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'temperature' ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value::float AS "Air Temp" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'air_temp' ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value::float AS "Light Intensity" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'light_intensity' ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS "time", sr.value::float AS "value", s.sensor_type AS "metric" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type IN ('ph', 'tds', 'temperature', 'air_temp', 'turbidity', 'light_intensity') ORDER BY (sr.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') ASC
SELECT (100.0 - (AVG(sr.value::float) / 50.0 * 100.0)) AS "WPI" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'turbidity'
SELECT ABS(AVG(sr.value::float) - 6.0) * 10 AS "pH Dev" FROM sensor_readings sr JOIN sensors s ON s.id = sr.sensor_id WHERE s.sensor_type = 'ph'
